entities.name: Amar Cael
entities.summary: > The corridor wasn’t listed on any ship manifest.

entities.name: Aven Voss
entities.summary: > The Martian wind didn’t howl-it whispered, dragging red dust in long, ribboned currents across the excavation field.

entities.name: Evelyn Tran
entities.summary: > Thane stood at the outer ring of the excavation grid, visor tinted against the Martian morning glare.
